reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(3)(i) focuses on workforce security, which involves managing access controls to ensure that only authorized personnel have access to sensitive data. In Kubernetes, this translates to implementing robust RBAC policies to enforce least privilege, ensuring that no users or service accounts have unnecessary cluster-admin privileges, and reviewing role bindings to prevent unauthorized access. Additionally, disabling service account token automounting by default helps mitigate risks of token misuse.
title: 164_308_a_3_i: 164.308(a)(3)(i) Workforce security
